case_title: ANDRE LAMAR RUCKER VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RUCKER, ANDRE LAMAR ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF ANDRE RUCKER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LUIS R. REYES, VICE PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF DECLINES STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANDRE LAMAR RUCKER. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JEFFREY JACKSON, OPERATION ANALYST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
